name: Pumprincess the Princess of Ghosts
name_jp: ゴースト<ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－パンプリンセス－
desc: If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell by this effect, during each Standby Phase: Place 1 Pumpkin Counter on this card. All monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK/DEF for each Pumpkin Counter on this card.
mnst_eff: If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell by this effect, during each Standby Phase: Place 1 Pumpkin Counter on this card. All monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK/DEF for each Pumpkin Counter on this card.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
